medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Presenting with 1 day of epigastric pain and chest pain radiating to left arm with associated diaphoresis. Awoke at 3:30 am with abdominal 'tightness' associated with diaphoresis similar to previous abdominal tightness during prior ER visits for bowel obstruction. Associated nausea and no bowel movement in 3 days, but passing flatus. Recent GI bug with diarrhea last week. Denied fevers or chills, hematochezia, or melena. Symptoms improved somewhat after baby ASA, O2, and nitroglycerin.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Hypercholesterolemia, hypothyroidism, hypertension, mitral valve prolapse, migraine headaches, bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome, chronic low back pain, history of pneumonia, urinary tract infection, gallbladder disease, s/p miscarriage with associated anxiety. Surgical history: Laparoscopic retrocolic Roux-en-Y gastric bypass, internal hernia causing small bowel obstruction:s/p ex lap and reduction of internal hernia, C-sections x 2, tonsillectomy, laparoscopic cholecystectomy.
medical_history.family_history: Father with diabetes and obesity, mother with heart disease, hyperlipidemia, obesity, asthma, arthritis; sister with hyperlipidemia, thyroid disease, obesity; grandmother deceased with heart disease; grandfather deceased with stroke.

physical_examination.general_examination: Vital signs: T99.2, HR 73, BP 142/84, RR 16, 100% RA. Abdomen: Soft, TTP left abdomen, +BS, no rebound or guarding.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: No significant neurologic deficits noted. Cardiovascular: RRR, no m/r/g.
